query: Fetch https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Claude_Shannon and tell me his birth date, death date, and three key contributions to information theory.
answer: Claude Shannon was born on April 30, 1916 and died on February 24, 2001. His three key contributions to information theory include the 1948 paper 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication', the concept of entropy as a measure of uncertainty or information content, and the noisy-channel coding theorem.
expected: URL fetch → researcher → distiller → critic (auto) → formatter
